items.title: [负面] The card game mechanics are fun, but spoiled by le...
items.summary:
The card game mechanics are fun, but spoiled by levels/stats etc., so most of the time the encounters are trivial. Fun when you just barely scrape by against higher level enemies, but there's no real point to do so.

The gacha is awful.. it's the usual garbage when you often need multiple copies of a character to make it worth using. Feels sort of f2p friendly when compared to other gachas, but that's really not saying much. The menus are full of stuff trying to get you buy and gamble more.

Also the art can be nice, but everything is *extremely* fanservice-y. It's just.. tacky.

items.summary: i like the character designs and the game play is fun as well

items.title:
[正面] This is it!

The anime gacha game that has good ga...
items.summary:
This is it!

The anime gacha game that has good game mechanics and finally some strategy.

I have dumped over a thousand hours into deckbuilders. I don't care or play pvp. So far, the game is definitely not p2w, and if you happen to like some of the characters and the strategy aspects of the game, this is definitely a must play.
